description: Phase 1 dynamic call fixture: Reflect.apply/construct/get and TypeScript decorators. Flagged kinds (computed-key, unresolved reflection) emit sink edges excluded from expected-edges.

edges.notes: Reflect.apply(greet, ctx, args) — reflection kind, resolves to greet()
Reflect.construct(UserService, args) — reflection kind, resolves to UserService class
Reflect.construct(UserService, args) — also attributes to the constructor method itself (#1892)
Reflect.get(obj, 'greet') — computed-literal kind, resolves to greet()
